CustomField.description: Formula field which shows the Membership Decision or Renewal Recommendation picklist label for use in the Advisory Council Recommendation Post To Chatter Flow TASK0175893
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL( ND_Membership_Decision__c , "")), CASE(ND_Membership_Decision__c, "A", "Approved", "R", "Rejected", "G", "Gift Contingent", "D", "Deferred to future FY", "" ), CASE(ND_Renewal_Recommendation__c, "UG", "Council 1 Year Renewal", "UB", "Council 3 Year Renewal", "UC", "Council Retire", "UT", "Council Transfer", "UF", "Defer to Council Leadership/Non Dev Interest", "UR", "Member Self Retire", "" ) )
CustomField.label: Decision Recommendation Formula
